dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3172 IS: To repeal certain Acts that impose sanctions upon Syria.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Shaheen (for herself, Mr. Mullin, and Ms. Ernst) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To repeal certain Acts that impose sanctions upon Syria.

subsection.header: Syria Accountability and Lebanese Sovereignty Restoration Act of 2003
subsection.text: The Syria Accountability and Lebanese Sovereignty Restoration Act of 2003 (Public Law 108–175; 22 U.S.C. 2151 note) is repealed.

subsection.header: Syria Human Rights Accountability Act of 2012
subsection.text: The Syria Human Rights Accountability Act of 2012 (title VII of Public Law 112–158; 22 U.S.C. 8701 et seq.) is repealed.
